title: Add SimpleAgent to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [SimpleAgent](https://pypi.org/project/weirenong-simpleagent/) to bots
- SimpleAgent is a lightweight Python framework for building autonomous agents. It runs a core execution loop to manage reasoning and actions, perform tasks, and use tools within a secure environment.

Fixes #10915

gist.headline: SimpleAgent joins the swarm
gist.blurb: The greenhouse is getting smarter. SimpleAgent just dropped into the bot directory—a lightweight Python framework for spinning up autonomous agents that can reason, act, and use tools.
gist.summary: Added SimpleAgent, a lightweight Python framework for building autonomous agents with a core execution loop for reasoning and tool use, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover SimpleAgent in the apps directory to help build and deploy their own secure, autonomous Python bots.
gist.visual_concept: SimpleAgent is an autonomous bot framework added to the 'greenhouse'. Depict Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot working together in a cozy digital greenhouse, growing autonomous 'agent' plants.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene inside a glowing digital greenhouse where the cute bee mascot is helping a chunky monitor-head robot tend to sprouting lime green (#ecf874) code-plants. The robot's screen shows a happy face. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background with warm sunlight filtering through the glass roof. Lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic, Stardew Valley vibes, large visible pixels, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
